features.name: Harness reliability pass
features.description: Make the coding-agent harness restartable by adding root state files, a startup script, current source-of-truth routing, and updated Vite/React production docs.
definition_of_done: Root AGENTS.md documents startup workflow, verification commands, scope rules, and Definition of Done.
Root feature_list.json, progress.md, session-handoff.md, and init.sh exist.
docs/SESSION_HANDOFF.md, docs/PRODUCTION_HARNESS.md, and docs/ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA.md reflect the v0.48/Vite state.
evidence: 2026-05-20: harness-creator validation passed at 100/100 across instructions, state, verification, scope, and lifecycle.
2026-05-20: ./init.sh passed; it ran npm run harness:gate with 40 test files / 291 tests, data validation, and production build passing.
features.next_step: Use the updated root harness files for future sessions, then start v0.49-alpha-event-reactions when product work resumes.

features.name: Office event reaction animation pass
features.description: Use the v0.48 sprite-sheet animation path to make card use, product launches, and rival/staff incidents produce short readable office reactions.
definition_of_done: At least one card-use or launch moment creates a visible office reaction.
Reaction data is driven by JSON or stable typed constants with a clear expansion path.
office-visuals QA scenario exposes the reaction state.
Relevant tests and npm run harness:gate pass.
Changelog, acceptance criteria, production report, and QA report are updated.
evidence: 2026-05-20: Added data/office_reactions.json with card_use, product_launch, rival_alert, and staff_incident hooks.
2026-05-20: getOfficeScenePlan now returns eventReactions and office-visuals exposes a prompt_sprint card-use reaction.
2026-05-20: npm test -- src/game/office-scene.test.ts src/ui/layout-contract.test.ts src/game/qa-scenarios.test.ts passed with 3 files / 67 tests.
features.next_step: Add sprite-sheet pose rows for cheers, alerts, and card-use effects after the alpha candidate pass.

features.name: Alpha candidate consolidation
features.description: Bundle UI stability, persona retest, and screenshot-readiness into a larger alpha candidate after event reactions land.
definition_of_done: 20-person persona QA is rerun against the current v0.5 candidate.
P0/P1 findings are fixed or explicitly waived.
The first screen communicates the fantasy and first action within 30 seconds.
npm run harness:gate passes and reports are updated.
features.next_step: Start after v0.49 reactions or after the user asks for a larger alpha-candidate pass.
